notes: SME 211 is an encoder-only device (H.264 Streaming Media Encoder); the paired decoder is the separate SMD 101 product. USB ports corrected per reviewer: two USB 2.0 Type-A ports (rear panel for storage/keyboard-mouse, front panel for storage) plus a front-panel mini USB-B CONFIG port for SIS commands. Primary Extron sources rejected bot-defense requests; information assembled from ManualsLib setup manual pages and official spec sheet references. HDMI version confirmed as 1.4a. Ethernet confirmed as 10/100/1000Base-T (eth-1g). No separate analog audio output connector — audio output is only via HDMI re-embedding. IEC power inlet type assumed C14 (standard for 1U rack unit with internal PSU); exact sub-variant not confirmed. RS-232 connector typed as euroblock (3.5mm captive screw), Extron standard captive-screw terminal style. 1U half-rack width enclosure.

ports.name: HDMI Preview Out
ports.note: Outputs mixed video with re-embedded stereo audio

ports.name: Audio In
ports.note: 3.5mm 5-pole captive screw connector; accepts balanced or unbalanced stereo line-level analog audio

ports.name: Remote
ports.note: 3.5mm 3-pole captive screw connector; RS-232 SIS serial control (Tx, Rx, Gnd)

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: 10/100/1000Base-T, half/full duplex with autodetect; used for streaming and device control

ports.name: USB Storage (Rear)
ports.note: Rear panel USB 2.0 Type-A for external storage device or keyboard and mouse (network setup)

ports.name: USB Storage (Front)
ports.note: Front panel USB 2.0 Type-A for external storage device or keyboard and mouse

ports.name: Config (Front)
ports.note: Front panel mini USB-B configuration port; connect a control device to send SIS commands for device configuration and control

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: 100-240 VAC, 0.7A, 50-60 Hz; internal Extron Everlast power supply; exact IEC variant (C13/C14) not explicitly stated in available documentation, IEC assumed for standard rack unit
